title: The flowering plants of South Africa; vol. 5
summaries: "The flowering plants of South Africa; vol. 5" by I. B. Pole Evans is an illustrated botanical magazine published in the 1920s. Part of a pioneering series depicting Africa's flowering plants, this volume features hand-colored lithographic illustrations created through meticulous family craft traditions. The magazine showcases botanical specimens from Africa and neighboring islands, combining scientific description with artistic beauty in an era when each plate required skilled artists to apply watercolor by hand.
